channel.title: Smoketopus' Website
channel.description: Smoketopus' art website, with a focus on robot art and the occasional game

item.title: March and April Art Dump
item.description: Uploading all my art from January and February thus far!

item.title: Jan and Feb Art Dump
item.description: Uploading all my art from January and February so far! Happy Leap day, everybody!

item.title: Art Dump
item.description: Uploading all the Art I've done in February so far!

item.title: Posca Patchouli
item.description: A posca painting of Patchoulli Knowledge from Touhou casting a magic spell

item.title: Gundam Witch, TFP Comic, and Ultra Magnus, wow!
item.description: Update featuring four new pieces of artwork! We have one based on episode 12 of Gundam Witch, a comic with Starscream and Shockwave, a followup drawing of Predaking, and the grumpiest Ultra Magnus you can imagine

item.title: Scolipede
item.description: Sketchpage of the Pokemon Scolipede from a variety of angles.

item.title: TFP Sketchpage
item.description: Added art of TFP Breakdown, Soundwave, and Arcee

item.title: Decepticon No More
item.description: Volume 2 of my Transformers Prime AU!

item.title: Mini Roommate
item.description: Uploaded an older comic from 2019, done in october, featuring my fursona getting a roommate!

item.title: Iron Leaguer Character Sorter
item.description: Added a little game that lets you sort through every single iron leaguer character to see who your faves are! WARNING: if you include the minor characters it can be long

item.title: Art Archive
item.description: Archive showing every single piece of my art that I could find from 2008 to 2022.

item.title: Con Creep
item.description: My first minicomic, made in 2019, and also the one I am like "oh god is this a thing people should even see" It is about the time when I was 13 that I went to an anime convention and some guy (who claimed to be 16...) started flirting with me. This was done for a comics class when the prompt was "make a comic about a really bad decision you made" and my decision was "going into a stranger's hotel room at an anime con when I was 13." I didn't really process the event as what it was until I made this so reading it in this form DID make me realize how utterly fucked up it was as far as things that have happened to me.

item.title: Shadowzoned
item.description: A Transformers Prime comic, that takes place after the events of the series.
